So that's another time when he was occupied, so he couldn't go to the bakery during that window. Then, Hannah saw him on a rooftop from 5pm to 6pm. So that's another time he was busy. Finally, Susan saw him driving to the water park from 6pm to 7pm. The bakery closes after 7pm, so if he went to the bakery, it would have to be before Susan saw him driving. So during Susan's sighting (option A), he was driving, so he couldn't have gone to the bakery then. But before that, there was a time when he wasn't seen doing anything. Then from 9am to 2pm, he was at the library. Then 2pm to 4pm at the store, then 4pm to 5pm at the Eiffel Tower, then 5pm to 6pm on the rooftop, then 6pm to 7pm driving. So the only time he wasn't seen doing anything is between 8am and 9am. That's option D. But wait, the question is asking between what times could Richard have gone to the bakery. The answer options are ranges, not specific times. So if he went to the bakery, it would have to be during a time that he wasn't seen doing other things. The only such time is between 8am and 9am.
